# Compass One Development Standard

Before implementing any requested feature:

1. Run Repository Compliance Audit.
2. Fix all Critical issues.
3. Report any Warnings.
4. Follow the Constitution.
5. Follow Governance.
6. Preserve Clean Architecture.
7. Do not move files unless requested.
8. Do not introduce new dependencies without justification.
9. Update documentation when architecture changes.
10. Keep all README files synchronized.

Repository Standard:
tools/repository-standard.json
